chinese_text: 道常無為而無不為。侯王若能守之，
translation_text: The Dao in its regular course does nothing (for the sake of doing it), and so there is nothing which it does not do.
translation_text_raw: The Dao in its regular course does nothing (for the sake of doing it), and so there is nothing which it does not do.

translation_text: If princes and kings were able to maintain it, all things would of themselves be transformed by them.
translation_text_raw: If princes and kings were able to maintain it, all things would of themselves be transformed by them.

chinese_text: 吾將鎮之以無名之樸。無名之樸，
translation_text: If this transformation became to me an object of desire, I would express the desire by the nameless simplicity.
translation_text_raw: If this transformation became to me an object of desire, I would express the desire by the nameless simplicity.

translation_text: Simplicity without a name Is free from all external aim.
translation_text_raw: Simplicity without a name Is free from all external aim.

translation_text: With no desire, at rest and still,
translation_text_raw: With no desire, at rest and still,

translation_text: All things go right as of their will.
translation_text_raw: All things go right as of their will.
